creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
brd@, I "assigned" it to you initially, as you introduced the regression.  If you are unwilling to fix regressions introduced, that is somewhat concerning.

Regardless of who takes it, it needs fixing.  Reverting r336859,336857,336845 would be an acceptable way of accomplishing this.  Changes from r337382, 338234, and 338238 may need to be reapplied carefully, but for now the impact of the bad move are still limited.
